lang.label: Language
search.label: Search
hero.subtitle: Forex, crypto, gold, indices and stocks — executed at institutional speed on a platform built for the world's most competitive traders. Join live tournaments and climb the global leaderboard.
footer.tagline: A premium global trading platform for forex, crypto, indices and commodities — with world-class competitions, real-time analytics and institutional-grade execution.
footer.risk.label: Risk Warning:
footer.risk.body: Trading leveraged products such as CFDs, forex and crypto carries a high level of risk and may not be suitable for all investors. You could lose more than your initial deposit. Ensure you fully understand the risks involved and seek independent advice if necessary. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
footer.compliance: Regulated globally · Segregated client funds · SSL secured
inv.subtitle: Our team of professional traders manages your capital with tested strategies and strict risk controls, while you monitor performance with full transparency.
inv.f1.b: Seasoned experts trading forex, gold, indices and crypto with a proven track record.
inv.f2.b: Daily loss limits, asset diversification and automated stop-loss to protect your capital.
inv.f3.b: Live dashboard shows every trade, performance and fee — no surprises.
inv.f4.b: Your funds are held in segregated accounts at tier-1 banks.
inv.plans.title: Investment Plans
inv.plans.sub: Choose the plan that fits your goals — upgrade anytime.
inv.how.title: How it works
inv.how.s1.b: Verify your identity and deposit the amount that suits you.
inv.how.s2.b: Our team trades on multiple markets following a proven strategy.
inv.how.s3.b: Monitor performance in real time and withdraw profits anytime.
inv.risk: Investing involves risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
auth.welcome.title: Welcome to the
auth.welcome.sub: One account. Every market. Real prize pools. Join more than 2 million traders competing on HK.
auth.feat.competitions: Enter live competitions from your dashboard
auth.otp.desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a 6-digit code valid for 5 minutes.
auth.mobile.welcome.sub: Sign in to access your trading terminal.
auth.mobile.open.sub: Join in under 5 minutes. No commitment.
auth.hint.password: Use 8+ characters with a mix of letters and numbers.
auth.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.err.password.min: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.confirm.title: Confirm your email
auth.confirm.sent: We sent a confirmation link to
auth.confirm.expires: Click the link in that email to activate your account. It expires in 24 hours.
auth.confirm.resent: A new confirmation email is on the way.
auth.confirm.timer_a: You can request another email in
auth.confirm.offline: You’re offline. Check your connection and try again.
auth.confirm.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
auth.verify.enter_email: Enter the email you signed up with to resend the confirmation link.
auth.verify.error.expired: The confirmation link has expired. Request a new one.
auth.verify.error.used: This link has already been used. Sign in or request a new one.
auth.verify.error.invalid: This link is invalid. Request a new confirmation link.
auth.verify.error.generic: We couldn’t complete verification. Request a new link.
auth.forgot.title: Reset your password
auth.forgot.sub: Enter the email linked to your account and we’ll send you a secure reset link.
auth.forgot.sent.title: Check your inbox
auth.forgot.sent.body_b: a reset link is on its way. The link expires in 60 minutes.
auth.forgot.spam: Didn’t get the email? Check your spam folder, then try again.
auth.forgot.err.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.forgot.err.rate_limit: For security reasons, please wait {seconds} seconds before requesting another link. Check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.err.rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please try again in {seconds} seconds.
auth.reset.title: Set a new password
auth.reset.sub: Choose a strong password you haven’t used before.
auth.reset.invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one to continue.
auth.reset.updated.title: Password updated
about.val.clientB: Your objectives shape every allocation. We are aligned with your outcomes.
about.val.discB: Rules-based risk controls prevent emotion from moving the portfolio.
about.val.transB: Every position and every fee is reported — nothing hidden.
about.val.excB: A senior team with decades of institutional experience.
